archer.description: A swift ranged attacker who fires volleys of arrows and excels at picking off distant targets.
archer.name: Archer
archer.passive_desc: Increases attack damage by 25%. Rain of Arrows deals 50% splash damage in a 2.0 unit radius.
archer.ultimate_desc: Rain of Arrows for 380% damage with splash.

artillery.ability_desc: Explosive shell that deals 150% damage and stuns the target for 0.5s.
artillery.description: A fragile but explosive backline siege unit that deals massive damage to anything in its sights.
artillery.name: Artillery
artillery.passive_desc: Attacks and abilities deal 30% splash damage in a 0.5 tile radius.
artillery.ultimate_desc: Fires a massive artillery shell for 330% with double splash radius.

berserker.ability_desc: Damages self for 15% max HP and gains a 30% max HP shield.
berserker.description: A savage warrior who thrives in the heat of battle, healing himself through sheer aggression.
berserker.name: Berserker
berserker.ultimate_desc: Unleashes a devastating strike for 420% true damage.

cleric.ability_desc: Heals an ally or self for 25 Health.
cleric.description: A dedicated holy healer who constantly heals her allies instead of attacking enemies.
cleric.name: Cleric
cleric.passive_desc: Can't attack, but gains 10 mana per second passively.

colossus.ability_desc: Taunts all targets in a 3 unit radius for 2.5s and deals 130% damage in a 1 unit radius.
colossus.description: A mountain of a tank with unmatched physical resistance and the ability to stun the entire battlefield.
colossus.name: Colossus
colossus.ultimate_desc: Colossal impact for 300% damage and a 2s stun.

disarmer.ability_desc: Disarms target for 1.0s and deals 130% damage.
disarmer.description: A weapon specialist who can disarm enemies and prevent them from attacking.
disarmer.name: Disarmer
disarmer.passive_desc: Attacks against disarmed targets have 20% increased attack speed.
disarmer.ultimate_desc: Creates a weapon suppression field that disarms all enemies in 3.0 unit radius for 2.0s.

earthbender.ability_desc: Slams the ground for 180% damage and roots target for 2.0s.
earthbender.description: A master of earth manipulation who can root enemies in place and control the battlefield.
earthbender.name: Earthbender
earthbender.passive_desc: When taking damage, gain 2% armor and magic resist for 5.0s. (Max 10 stacks)
earthbender.ultimate_desc: Causes an earthquake for 350% damage and roots all enemies in 3.0 unit radius for 3.5s.

frost_mage.ability_desc: Fires an ice bolt for 130% magic damage and slows target by 30% for 2.5s.
frost_mage.description: A cryomancer who controls ice and frost, slowing enemies with every attack and freezing them with powerful spells.
frost_mage.name: Frost Mage
frost_mage.ultimate_desc: Creates a blizzard for 320% magic damage and slows all enemies in 2.5 tile radius by 50% for 4.0s.

guardian.ability_desc: Grants a shield worth 20% max HP to self or an ally.
guardian.description: A hulking protector who uses heavy shields to soak damage and a massive slam to stun entire groups.
guardian.name: Guardian
guardian.ultimate_desc: Slams the ground for 290% damage and a 3.8s stun.

mirror_knight.ability_desc: Gains a 25% damage reflect shield for 3.0s.
mirror_knight.description: A defensive warrior who reflects damage back at attackers and protects allies with mirrored shields.
mirror_knight.name: Mirror Knight
mirror_knight.passive_desc: Permanently reflects 10% of all damage taken back to attackers.
mirror_knight.ultimate_desc: Creates a mirrored aura for 180% damage, granting 40% reflect to all allies in 2.0 unit radius for 5.0s.

mistcaller.ability_desc: Heals a target for 15% of their missing health over 5 seconds.
mistcaller.description: A restorative support who summons enchanted mists that gradually heal allies and sustain them through prolonged fights.
mistcaller.name: Mistcaller
mistcaller.passive_desc: Every 5 seconds, heals all allies in a 2.0 unit radius for 10% of their missing health over 5 seconds.
mistcaller.ultimate_desc: Heals all allies in a 3.0 unit radius for 20% of their maximum health over 5 seconds.

monk.ability_desc: Precise strike for 150% damage that silences the target for 1.0s.
monk.description: A martial arts master who uses a flurry of strikes to incapacitate foes through precise pressure points.
monk.name: Monk
monk.passive_desc: Every 3rd attack stuns the target for 0.5s.
monk.ultimate_desc: Gains 10% max HP shield and reflects 50% damage for 3s.

ninja.ability_desc: Dashes toward the target enemy. If reached, deal 150% damage and stun for 0.5s.
ninja.description: A high-mobility predator designed to dive the backline and execute wounded targets with lethal precision.
ninja.name: Ninja
ninja.passive_desc: Deals double damage to targets below 30% HP.
ninja.ultimate_desc: Executes a target with 900% physical damage.

oracle.ability_desc: Grants a shield worth 15% max HP to self or an ally.
oracle.description: A divine seer who manipulates fate through shields and mana restoration.
oracle.name: Oracle
oracle.passive_desc: Gains an additional 5 mana after each auto-attack.
oracle.ultimate_desc: Restores 35% max HP and grants a shield worth 35% max HP.

paladin.description: A holy knight who balances immense durability with powerful self-healing and divine judgment.
paladin.name: Paladin
paladin.ultimate_desc: Heals self for 40% max HP and deals 200% true damage.

rogue.description: A nimble backline specialist who strikes with precision and vanishes before being targeted.
rogue.name: Rogue
rogue.passive_desc: 25% chance to dodge incoming auto attacks, avoiding all damage.

silencer.ability_desc: Strikes target for 170% damage and silences for 2.0s.
silencer.description: A magical assassin who specializes in silencing mages and disrupting spellcasters.
silencer.name: Silencer
silencer.passive_desc: Deals 25% bonus damage to silenced targets.
silencer.ultimate_desc: Creates a silence zone for 340% damage, silencing all enemies in 3.0 unit radius for 4.0s.

siren.description: A captivating support who lures enemies into stuns and drains their mana with every haunting song.
siren.name: Siren
siren.passive_desc: Auto-attacks drain 5 mana from the target.
siren.ultimate_desc: Shrieks for 280% magic damage and stunning for 1.0s.

sniper.description: An elite marksman specializing in devastating single-target shots.
sniper.name: Sniper
sniper.passive_desc: Deals 25% bonus damage to targets further than 3 units away.

swordsman.description: A skilled duelist who gains attack damage with each strike and can stun groups of enemies.
swordsman.name: Swordsman
swordsman.passive_desc: Gains 5 attack damage for 3 seconds after each auto-attack. (Max 5 stacks)

valkyrie.ability_desc: Bashes target for 220% damage and 0.5s stun.
valkyrie.description: A formidable bruiser who grows more dangerous as she fights, slamming foes with her shield.
valkyrie.name: Valkyrie
valkyrie.passive_desc: Auto attacks additionally deal 10 physical damage in a 0.5 radius around herself and heals for 100% of the damage dealt.
valkyrie.ultimate_desc: War cry dealing 400% damage and 1.5s stun.

warlock.ability_desc: Deals 100% magic damage and heals self for 10% of it.
warlock.description: A dark sorcerer who siphons the life force of his enemies to sustain himself and his allies.
warlock.name: Warlock
warlock.passive_desc: Heals for 5 HP after each auto-attack.
warlock.ultimate_desc: Rifts the ground for 260% magic damage and 0.5s stun.

windcaller.ability_desc: Blasts target with wind for 120% magic damage, knocks back 1.5 tiles, and slows by 20% for 1 second.
windcaller.description: An air elemental who controls winds to push enemies away and control battlefield positioning.
windcaller.name: Windcaller
windcaller.passive_desc: When knocking back enemies, gain a 15% max hp shield.
windcaller.ultimate_desc: Creates a tornado for 300% magic damage, knocking back all enemies in a 5 tile radius by 2 units.

wizard.ability_desc: Fires a magical projectile dealing 170% magic damage.
wizard.description: A powerful spellcaster with a deep mana pool, capable of unleashing frequent bursts of magic damage.
wizard.name: Wizard
wizard.ultimate_desc: Calls down a meteor for 500% magic damage and deals splash damage on impact.

wraith.description: A terrifying spectral assassin that stuns its prey and moves faster than the eye can see.
wraith.name: Wraith
wraith.passive_desc: Every second, enters stealth for 0.5 seconds. Stealth breaks on attack or ability cast.
wraith.ultimate_desc: Magic strike for 250% magic damage and 1.5s stun.
